mobileOutcomes: Mobile navigation now reflects real app behavior when the AI action is used.
Core mobile controls are easier to hit comfortably with a thumb.
The bottom of the app has better space for fixed controls and safe-area devices.
The search/filter area feels less cramped on narrow widths.
Task creation/editing actions are easier to use in the bottom-sheet flow on mobile.
notableChanges: Connected the mobile AI nav tab to the actual assistant open state instead of leaving the tab as a dead mobile view.
Added bottom safe-area-aware mobile page padding and repositioned fixed mobile surfaces so the bottom nav, FAB, assistant trigger, and toast stack interfere less with each other.
Expanded mobile touch targets in the header and task row action controls.
Refactored the filter/search bar into a stacked mobile layout with a larger filter select and a taller search field.
Made the day add-task action full-width on mobile and improved the task modal action layout for narrow screens.
Moved the closed AI assistant trigger to the lower-left on mobile to avoid colliding with the add-task FAB on the lower-right.
